info.title: FPR Tools API
info.description: Flight Pricing & Revenue tools — pricing, supply, demand, and config domains.

post.description: Retrieve automated pricing rules (autopilot) that dynamically adjust flight prices. Filter by country pair and airline to see which autopilot rules are active. Use when someone asks about 'autopilot rules', 'automated pricing', or 'dynamic pricing config' for a specific market.

data.description: Request parameters for loading autopilot rules

profileName.description: Country code (ISO 2-letter) that identifies the rule set. E.g. ID (Indonesia), TH (Thailand), VN (Vietnam), SG (Singapore), MY (Malaysia), PH (Philippines)

currency.description: Currency code for the country. E.g. IDR (Indonesia), THB (Thailand), VND (Vietnam), SGD (Singapore), MYR (Malaysia), PHP (Philippines)

post.description: Retrieve baseline markup/margin rules that define the base price adjustment for flights. These are the foundational pricing rules before any dynamic or promotional adjustments. Use when someone asks about 'baseline markup', 'base margin', 'default pricing rules', or 'how much markup do we add'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

airlineId.description: IATA airline code, e.g. GA, SQ, QZ

post.description: Check the remaining and used budget balance for pricing operations. Returns how much budget is left and how much has been consumed. Use when someone asks 'how much budget is left', 'budget remaining for IDR', or 'pricing budget status'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

currency.description: Currency code: IDR (Indonesian Rupiah), THB (Thai Baht), VND (Vietnamese Dong), SGD (Singapore Dollar), MYR (Malaysian Ringgit)

post.description: List all currently active pricing budgets filtered by currency. Shows budget names, levels, and allocation details. Use when someone asks 'what budgets are active', 'show all budgets for IDR', or 'budget list'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

currency.description: Currency code: IDR, THB, VND, SGD, MYR

post.description: List all budget level types available in the system (e.g. DAILY, WEEKLY, MONTHLY levels). Use when someone asks 'what budget levels exist' or 'budget level types'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Check budget balance at the individual user level. Shows per-user budget consumption and remaining allocation. Use when someone asks about a specific user's budget or 'user budget balance'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

currency.description: Currency code: IDR, THB, VND, SGD, MYR

post.description: Retrieve bundling pricing rules that define how bundled products (flight + hotel, flight + insurance) are priced. Use when someone asks about 'bundle pricing', 'bundling rules', or 'package deal pricing config'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Retrieve anchor fare and price prediction rules used for dynamic pricing. These rules define how the system predicts fare trends and sets anchor prices. Use when someone asks about 'price prediction', 'anchor fare rules', 'dynamic pricing prediction', or 'fare forecast config'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.summary: Load Price Cut / Promo Modifier Rules
post.description: Retrieve price cut and promotional modifier rules. These define temporary price reductions, flash sales, and promotional adjustments. Use when someone asks about 'price cut rules', 'promo modifiers', 'discount config', or 'flash sale pricing'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Retrieve transaction/service fee rules. These define additional fees charged on top of the base fare (e.g. booking fee, service charge). Use when someone asks about 'transaction fees', 'service fees', 'booking charges', or 'trx fee config'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Retrieve commission rate rules for airline partners. Defines how much commission Traveloka receives per ticket from each airline. Use when someone asks about 'commission rates', 'airline commission', 'incentive rules for SQ', or 'partner commission config'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

airlineId.description: IATA airline code to filter commission rules, e.g. GA, SQ, QZ

post.description: List all available commission incentive profile names. Profiles group commission rules together. Use when someone asks 'what commission profiles exist' or needs to know profile names before querying specific rules.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Retrieve volume-based tiered incentive rules. These define bonus commission tiers based on booking volume (e.g. sell 100+ tickets = extra 2% commission). Use when someone asks about 'tiered incentives', 'volume bonuses', 'tier-based commission', or 'incentive tiers for a brand'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.summary: Check Tiered Incentive Progress for a Booking
post.description: Check the tiered incentive progress for a specific booking by its PNR code. Shows which incentive tier the booking falls into and how much bonus was earned. Use when someone asks 'check incentive for PNR ABC123', 'tiered progress for a booking', or 'did this booking qualify for bonus commission'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Retrieve ticket issuance fee rules. These define fees charged for issuing airline tickets through different providers. Use when someone asks about 'issuance fees', 'ticketing fees', 'ticket issuance charges', or 'issuance fee config'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: List all available pricing profile names. Pricing profiles group pricing rules by business context (e.g. default, promo, enterprise). Use when someone asks 'what pricing profiles exist' or needs profile names for further queries.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Retrieve feature flags for a specific application. Shows which features are enabled/disabled and their current state. Use when someone asks about 'feature flags', 'is X feature enabled', 'flag status for fprtckt', or 'what flags are on'. Keywords: feature flags, flag status, feature enablement.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

applicationName.description: Application name, e.g. fprtckt, fprcoin, fprlari, fprbud, fprtxf

200.description: Feature flags for application retrieved successfully

post.description: List all applications that have feature flags configured. Use when someone asks 'which apps have flags', 'flag applications', or needs to know what application names to use. Keywords: flag applications, application list, configured apps.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

200.description: List of flag applications retrieved successfully

post.description: Get detailed configuration for a specific feature flag. Shows the flag's rules, conditions, rollout percentage, and targeting criteria. Use when someone asks 'what does flag X do', 'flag configuration', or 'how is this flag set up'. Keywords: flag configuration, rollout settings, flag rules.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Load reusable filter condition groups. Condition groups define sets of criteria (routes, airlines, dates) that can be shared across pricing rules. Use when someone asks about 'condition groups', 'filter conditions', 'reusable conditions', or 'what conditions are defined'. Keywords: condition groups, filter criteria, reusable filters.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Retrieve activity and audit logs showing who changed what configuration and when. Essential for tracking config changes and debugging. Use when someone asks 'who changed this', 'audit log', 'activity log', 'recent changes', or 'what was modified'. Keywords: audit log, activity log, configuration changes, change tracking.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

entityType.description: Entity type (CRUD entity name). Common values: flight-PricingAutopilotRules, flight-PricingBaselineRules, flight-CommissionIncentiveRules, flight-PricingBudget, flight-PricePredictionRules, flight-TransactionFee

entryId.description: Entry ID to query logs for. For autopilot: {profileGroup}.{profileType}.{productType}.{profileName}.{currency} e.g. AFFILIATE.SPECIFIC.STANDALONE.skyscanner-flight.THB

post.description: List all supported airline IDs in the system. Returns IATA codes and airline names. Use when someone asks 'what airlines are supported', 'list airlines', 'airline codes', or needs to look up an airline code. Keywords: airline codes, IATA codes, supported airlines.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: List all supported countries in the system. Returns country codes and names. Use when someone asks 'what countries are supported', 'list countries', 'country codes', or needs to verify a country code. Keywords: country codes, supported countries, country list.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Convert an amount between currencies using FPR's internal exchange rates. Use when someone asks to 'convert IDR to USD', 'what is 1000 THB in IDR', 'currency conversion', or needs to compare amounts across markets. Keywords: currency conversion, exchange rate, amount conversion.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

fromCurrency.description: Source currency code, e.g. IDR, THB, VND, USD

post.description: Search user profiles and segmentation data. Returns user segment assignments and profile attributes. Use when someone asks about 'user segment', 'user profile', 'what segment is this user in', or 'customer profiling'. Keywords: user segmentation, profile lookup, customer segment.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

200.description: User profile and segmentation data retrieved successfully

post.description: Load user profiling configuration for a specific country. Shows how users are segmented and what criteria are used. Use when someone asks about 'profiling setup', 'segmentation config', or 'how are users categorized'. Keywords: segmentation rules, profile criteria, country configuration.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

profileGroup.description: Country-based profile group code, e.g. ID (Indonesia), TH (Thailand), VN (Vietnam)

post.description: Retrieve flight booking details by booking ID. Returns flight segments, pricing breakdown, passenger info, and booking status. Use when someone asks about 'booking details', 'booking ID 12345', 'what's in this booking', or 'flight info for booking'. Keywords: booking lookup, flight segments, booking status.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Retrieve flight booking details as raw JSON format. Same data as get_flight_info but in machine-readable JSON structure. Use when you need structured booking data for analysis or comparison. Keywords: booking JSON, structured data, machine-readable.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

200.description: Flight booking information in JSON format retrieved successfully

post.description: Retrieve booking log content from S3 storage. Shows detailed booking event logs for debugging and audit purposes. Use when someone asks about 'booking log', 'booking events', 'what happened during booking', or needs to trace a booking issue. Keywords: booking events, S3 logs, booking audit trail.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

path.description: S3 path to specific log object

post.description: Retrieve winner details by winner code. Winners are the selected fare/provider combination for a booking. Use when someone asks about 'winner code', 'which provider won', or 'winning fare details'. Keywords: winner code, provider selection, fare winner.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Search winners by specification and conditions. Find which fares/providers won for specific routes or criteria. Use when someone asks 'who wins on this route', 'winner search', or 'fare winner analysis'. Keywords: winner search, provider analysis, route winners.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Execute direct MongoDB queries on demand-side collections. Supports GET, UPSERT, and DELETE operations on any demand_booking collection. Use when someone needs to 'query mongo', 'check mongo collection', or run a 'direct database query'. WARNING: UPSERT/DELETE operations modify data. Keywords: MongoDB, direct query, database operation.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Look up cached fare data for a specific route. Shows what fares are currently cached for a given origin-destination pair. Use when someone asks about 'fare cache', 'cached prices for JKT-SIN', 'what fares are cached', or 'demand cache by route'. Keywords: fare cache, route cache, cached fares.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

origin.description: Origin airport code, e.g. CGK, BKK, SGN

post.description: Look up demand cache by a specific search ID. Retrieves the cached search results for a particular search session. Use when someone has a 'search ID' and wants to see what results were cached. Keywords: search ID cache, session cache, search results.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

searchId.description: Search ID from a demand search session

200.description: Cache data by search ID retrieved successfully

post.description: List all available MongoDB collection names in the demand database. Use when someone asks 'what mongo collections exist', 'list collections', or needs to know which collections can be queried. Keywords: MongoDB collections, collection list, available collections.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Get supporting data and options for promo labels. Returns available promo label types, configurations, and setup options. Use when someone asks about 'promo label options', 'label configuration', or needs to set up new promo labels. Keywords: label configuration, promo options, label setup.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

200.description: Promo label supporting data retrieved successfully

post.description: Run a simulated flight search and return results. Mimics a real user search to test pricing, availability, and display. Use when someone asks to 'simulate a search', 'test search results', 'what would a user see for JKT-SIN', or 'run a search simulation'. Keywords: search simulation, test search, search results.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.summary: Update autopilot pricing rules (create/modify rules with conditions and adjustments)

data.description: Request payload for updating autopilot rules. Must include the full autopilotToolData from load-rules response with modifications, plus version for optimistic locking.

autopilotToolData.description: The full autopilot document. Get this from load-rules response, modify rules as needed, then pass back.

rules.description: Array of autopilot rules. Each rule has conditions, adjustmentDefault, and optional adjustmentFallback.

conditions.description: Rule conditions (routes, airlines, etc). Preserve from load-rules response.

adjustmentFallback.description: Fallback adjustment when scraping data unavailable

version.description: Optimistic lock version from load-rules response. MUST match current version or update will be rejected.

notes.description: Change notes describing what was modified

approvalRequester.description: Email of the person requesting approval (optional)

post.summary: Get single promo label by ID
post.description: Get single flightPromoLabel entry by ID. POST /api/v2/crud/getEntryDetail

List/search flightPromoLabel entries via CRUD framework.
Available filter fields: archived, enabled, end_date, last_update, priority
Request goes to POST /api/v2/crud/getEntryList

filter.description: Filter conditions. Known fields: archived, enabled, end_date, last_update, priority

tags.name: pricing
tags.description: Flight pricing rules — markup, budget, commission, incentive, and fee management

tags.name: supply
tags.description: Fare sourcing — fare adjusters, providers, routes, inventory, and fare checking

tags.name: demand
tags.description: Demand analysis — search simulation, fare cache, booking details, user profiling, promo labels

tags.name: config
tags.description: System configuration — feature flags, condition groups, reference data, currency conversion, audit logs
